app.name: ReportCrime
app.tagline: Kony me kom kuc ki tito lok

splash.welcome: En ber ba! Gwok twonyo mamegi
splash.loading: Tye ka yubo dashboard mar kuc mamegi. Ibikwalo i yo matidi.

auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Ket mung kode manyen piny ii kabedo man
auth.guestBanner: Done me gwoko ripoot mamegi maber ki lok ki lutic mapol. Luokelo bene gitwero neno.
auth.passwordResetSent: Imeyil me loko mung kode ocwale! Nen sanduk mamegi.
auth.smsSent: Kode pa SMS ocwale! Nen mob mamegi.
auth.signupSuccess: Konte oyubbu! Cung nen imeyil mamegi me nigi konte mamegi.

errors.loginFailed: Done pe olare. Cung nen gin ma imiyo me done.
errors.googleFailed: Done ki Google pe olare. Tem doki.
errors.phoneFailed: Done ki mob pe olare. Tem doki.
errors.resetFailed: Pe onongo cwalo imeyil me loko. Tem doki.
errors.signupFailed: Coo nyingi pe olare. Tem doki.
errors.passwordTooShort: Mung kode myero obed ki leb apar abicel ma oto
errors.enterEmail: Cung ket adres pa imeyil mamegi
errors.enterPhone: Cung ket namba pa mob mamegi
errors.invalidResetLink: Cope me loko pe tye kakare. Cug peny doki.
errors.passwordResetFailed: Pe onongo loko mung kode. Tem doki.

footer.securityNote: Pi kom gwoko mamegi, pe miyee gin ma iwaco kod mamegi onyo ngec mung bot ngat mo. Bed ma neno maber ki bedo aonon.

dashboard.title: 🛡️ Ibin ber, Uganda
dashboard.subtitle: Tit lok oyot, yeny kony, ki rwatte ki gin ma gwoko kuc.

reportCrime.label: Tit Lok me Tim Marac
reportCrime.description: Ket ripoot pa tim marac onyo lok me acako

getHelp.label: Yeny Kony
getHelp.description: Rwatte ki lutic me cito oyot onyo kony

missingPersons.label: Lwak Ma Kibinonogi
missingPersons.description: Nen onyo tit cing dano ma kibinonogi

searchStations.label: Yeny Kema
searchStations.description: Nong kemawic pa lulweny ma cok

laws.label: Cik pa Katiba
laws.description: Neno cik ki twonyo pa dano

reportMissingPerson.label: Tit Dano Ma Kibinonogi
reportMissingPerson.description: Yub ripoot manyen pa dano ma kibinonogi

reportMissingProperty.label: Tit Jami Ma Kibinonogi
reportMissingProperty.description: Yub ripoot pa jami ma kibinonogi

reportCrime.title: Tit Lok me Tim Marac / Acako
reportCrime.subtitle: Muko gin piny woko me cwalo ripoot pa tim marac onyo acako. Kabedo ma tye ki * gipelogi.
reportCrime.descriptionPlaceholder: Cob gin ma otimere ki gin mo weng ma itye kwede
reportCrime.uploadHint: Med gin ma nyuto adaa calo cal, vidio onyo waraga.

getHelp.title: Yeny Kony
getHelp.subtitle: Rwatte kwaa kawaawa oyot ki WhatsApp, SMS, mob, imeyil, onyo kony pa AI.

lostAndFound.title: Gin Malanyo ki Manonge
lostAndFound.subtitle: Nen gin malanyogi onyo ket ngec manyen pa gin malanyo ki manonge.

form.title: Tit Jami Malany / Manonge
form.locationPlaceholder: laco Yo Kampala, cok ki Shell
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Kol, cal, gin ma tye iye...

missingPersons.title: Lwak Ma Kibinonogi
missingPersons.subtitle: Nen dano mo weng ma kitito cing binonogi. Yeny ki nyingi onyo kabedo.
missingPersons.loading: Tye ka nongo lwak ma kibinonogi…

reportMissingPerson.title: Tit Dano Ma Kibinonogi
reportMissingPerson.subtitle: Cwalo ripoot pa dano ma kibinonogi ki gin weng ma mite me nongo.
reportMissingPerson.submit: Cwalo Ripoot pa Dano Ma Kibinonogi
reportMissingPerson.successMessage: Ripoot pa dano ma kibinonogi ocwale maber

reportMissingProperty.title: Tit Jami Ma Kibinonogi
reportMissingProperty.subtitle: Cob jami ki kabedo ma kinene icen.
reportMissingProperty.descriptionPlaceholder: Kol, cal makato, gin ma tye iye, ki mukene.
reportMissingProperty.submit: Cwalo Ripoot pa Jami Ma Kibinonogi
reportMissingProperty.successMessage: Ripoot pa jami ma kibinonogi ocwale maber

searchStations.title: Yeny Kemawic pa Lulweny
searchStations.subtitle: Nong kemawic pa Lulweny pa Uganda ki nyingi, distrikt, onyo ekere. Cwal mob onyo nong yo oyot.
searchStations.searchPlaceholder: Yeny ki nyingi, distrikt, onyo ekere…
searchStations.noMatch: Kema mo pe lube ki yeny mamegi.
searchStations.footerNote: Namba me cito oyot: 999 (Lulweny) • 112 (Weng). Cwal 999 nino weng ma tye ki cwiny me kwero kwo.

lawsAndRights.title: Cik pa Katiba ki Twonyo
lawsAndRights.subtitle: Nen twonyo mamegi calo Luwi Uganda — ma Katiba pa Uganda, 1995 ogwoko.

notifications.title: Ngec
notifications.subtitle: Bed i ngec pi ripootiini, penyo, ki ngec pa kit tic.
notifications.noUnread: Ngec ma peya kiwenyo pe tye.
notifications.loginPrompt: Cung done me neno ngec mamegi.

settings.title: Yubo
settings.subtitle: Lo gin pa konte mamegi ki yubo pa app.
settings.accountDescription: Lo profile mamegi ki yo me done
settings.notificationsDescription: Lo ngec ma cwalo ki imeyil
settings.builtWith: Ogero ki React, Supabase, ki teknoloji ma manyen.

admin.dashboardSubtitle: Lo lutic, nen penyo, ki gwoko kit tic.
admin.activeInLast30: ma tye ka tic i nino 30 icen
admin.manageUsersDesc: Nen, yabo, lor, onyo kwany lutic
admin.manageAdminsDesc: Med onyo kwany konte pa ludito
admin.pendingRequestsDesc: Nen ki dok bot penyo pa lutic
admin.searchUsers: Yeny lutic ki nyingi onyo imeyil
